task.name: Trade Network Panel
task.description: Dedicated dockable window visualizing trade relationships as a network graph. Replaces ineffective grid-overlay with proper graph visualization showing who traded with whom, using force-directed or circular layouts, with nodes colored by alpha and edges encoding frequency and recency.

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Visualize trade network structure to support research into network emergence, clustering, and efficiency
success_criteria: Trade relationships visible as network graph
Supports research question: How does network structure emerge?

context.gap_analysis_summary: Trade network data structures exist in analysis/emergence.py (TradeEdge, build_trade_network, TradeNetworkStats). Current grid overlay in app.py doesn't work well. Need: dedicated window, graph layout algorithms, proper rendering, interaction.
canonical_sources: VISION.md - Trade networks mentioned in Research Agenda
VISUALIZATION.md - Trade networks listed as future overlay
DearPyGui documentation - window and drawing APIs

phases.name: Window Infrastructure
phases.description: Create dockable window with basic structure, menu item to show/hide, and placeholder content.
phases.exit_criteria: Trade Network window opens from menu, can be closed and reopened, persists position

phases.name: Graph Rendering & Layout
phases.description: Implement node and edge drawing with circular and force-directed layout algorithms.
phases.exit_criteria: Network graph renders with both layouts, toggle switches between them

phases.name: Visual Encoding & Polish
phases.description: Apply visual encodings (alpha color, edge thickness/color) and refine appearance.
phases.exit_criteria: Nodes colored by alpha, edges show frequency and recency, visually polished

phases.name: Interaction & Integration
phases.description: Add click-to-select, live/replay mode support, and network metrics display.
phases.exit_criteria: Clicking node selects agent in grid, works in both modes, metrics displayed

features.name: Dockable Window Creation
features.description: Create a separate DearPyGui window for the trade network visualization that can be positioned independently.

functional: Window created with dpg.window() or dpg.add_window()
Window can be moved and resized
Window can be closed with X button

features.name: Menu/Button to Show Window
features.description: Add a way to open the Trade Network window from the main visualization UI.

functional: Button or menu item exists to show Trade Network window
Clicking it opens the window if closed
Clicking it focuses the window if already open

features.name: Circular Layout Algorithm
features.description: Implement circular layout where nodes are arranged on a ring with edges through the center.

functional: All agent nodes positioned on a circle

features.name: Force-Directed Layout Algorithm
features.description: Implement force-directed layout where connected nodes attract and unconnected repel, creating organic clustering.

functional: Nodes with trade relationships cluster together

features.name: Layout Toggle
features.description: Add toggle or dropdown to switch between circular and force-directed layouts.

functional: UI control exists to switch layouts

features.name: Node Color Encoding
features.description: Color nodes by agent alpha parameter, matching the grid visualization color scheme.

functional: Colors match corresponding agents in grid view
Node has visible border for clarity

features.name: Edge Thickness Encoding
features.description: Edge thickness encodes trade frequency (number of trades between pair).

functional: Edge thickness varies with trade count

features.name: Edge Color Encoding
features.description: Edge color encodes recency (recent trades brighter, older trades faded).

features.name: Click Node to Select Agent
features.description: Clicking a node in the network selects the corresponding agent in the main grid view.

functional: Selection syncs both directions (grid click updates network highlight)
Visual feedback on selected node in network view

features.name: Live and Replay Mode Support
features.description: Network panel works in both live simulation and replay modes, using appropriate data sources.

functional: Live mode: network updates as trades occur
Replay mode: network reflects trades up to current tick
Reset clears network in both modes

features.name: Network Metrics Display
features.description: Display network statistics (density, clustering, degrees) below or beside the graph.

functional: Shows number of nodes and edges

resolved.rationale: Flexible positioning, can be on second monitor, doesn't reduce grid space, can be closed when not needed

resolved.choice: Both force-directed and circular with toggle
resolved.rationale: Different layouts suit different analysis needs - circular for overview, force-directed for clustering

resolved.choice: Node color = alpha (fixed size), edge thickness = frequency, edge color = recency
resolved.rationale: Maintains consistency with grid view (alpha coloring), encodes two dimensions on edges without overloading nodes

escalation_triggers: Changes to core simulation logic (simulation.py, agent.py)
Breaking changes to existing visualization functionality
